subject: Hang in generic/648 on zoned btrfs after aa35dd5cbc06 ("iomap: fix invalid folio access after folio_end_read()")

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Raised several questions about the reproducibility of the hang, including whether it consistently occurs when a zoned device is probed and how the setup differs from Joanne's own attempts to reproduce the issue.
